React Hooks Explorer
Learn Hooks
Interactively
Hands-on playgrounds for useState and useEffect — React's most essential hooks. Click, type, and watch effects happen in real time.
Hook #1
useState — Reactive State
useState
0
// Declare state variable
const [count, setCount] = useState(0)

// Update with new value
setCount(count + 1)

// Update with function (safer)
setCount(c ⇒ c + 1)
💡
How it worksCalling setCount() triggers a re-render with the new value. React batches multiple state updates for performance.

String State — live binding

Array State — todo list

✓
Learn useState
Learn useEffect
